title: Vitax Green Up Lawn Care Enhance Liquid Lawn Feed 200sqm
features: Can be used in wet or dry conditions
Contains organic nutrients and essential amino acids
The most advanced liquid lawn fertiliser
Used on freshly germinated and newly established lawns
description: Product description Green Up Enhance Liquid Lawn Feed is the soluble alternative to the granular Green Up Enhance lawn feeds. Used by professional greenkeepers, it has added seaweed and a turf wetting agent which helps reduce grass stress and improves root growth. Apply Green Up Enhance Liquid Lawn Feed any time from March to September. Re-apply two to three times over the growing season to maintain grass vigour and vibrancy. If you are looking for a quality lawn which looks as good as a professional pitch, spray grass at monthly intervals. Apply with a watering can, or for larger lawns with a dribble bar. Green Up Enhance Liquid Lawn Feed can also be applied via a knapsack or other sprayer. Children and pets are allowed onto treated areas following application. Always wash hands after use. Directions Apply this product from March to September, reapplying every 2-3 months for maintenance. For professional-grade lawns, apply monthly. Use a watering can, dribble bar, knapsack, or other sprayers for application. Suitable for wet or dry conditions and freshly germinated or newly established lawns. Children and pets may enter the treated area following application. Safety Warning Always wash hands after use. See more
